source.note: Fetched directly from DFAS, the DoD paying agent. These are the authoritative rates, not a secondary summary. Earlier attempts returned HTTP 403 because the request lacked a full browser header set and a trailing slash on the path; both are required.

bas.bas_ii_note: BAS II is double the standard enlisted rate. It applies only to enlisted members in government quarters WITHOUT adequate food-storage or preparation facilities, and without a nearby dining facility. It is not a general entitlement.

hazardous_duty_incentive_pay.note: HDIP is paid monthly, in addition to basic pay, for performing a designated hazardous duty. It is taxable.

rates.duty: Parachute Duty — Army Static Line (Oct 1, 2025 – May 20, 2029)
Maritime Visit, Board, Search & Seizure (VBSS) Duty
Weapons of Mass Destruction Civil Support Team
Aerial flight — air crew (officer and enlisted)
Aerial flight — non-air crew (officer and enlisted)

aviation_incentive_pay_max.note: Maximum officer Aviation Incentive Pay, by years of aviation service. Actual rate is set by the service.

other_official_tables.name: Dive Duty Pay
other_official_tables.note: Rates vary by service and qualification; Army enlisted under instruction at an approved diving school begins at $110/month.

other_official_tables.name: Foreign Language Proficiency Bonus (FLPB)
other_official_tables.note: Paid by ILR proficiency level across listening, reading and speaking. Rates begin around $50/month per modality.

unverified: Submarine Duty Pay rates: the DFAS page returned no parseable dollar table in this pass. Linked out rather than guessed.
Imminent Danger / Hostile Fire Pay monthly rate: not captured in this pass. The IDP AREAS table lists locations, not the rate.
Career Sea Pay rates: not captured in this pass.
Full FLPB rate matrix: the table is by ILR level and modality; only the entry band (~$50/month) was captured.
Full Dive Duty Pay matrix by service and qualification: only the Army entry rate ($110/month) was captured.
completion_accountability: BAS, HDIP, flight HDIP and maximum Aviation Incentive Pay captured as OFFICIAL DFAS rates. Submarine, sea, dive (full matrix), FLPB (full matrix) and Imminent Danger Pay rates were NOT captured and are linked out with an explicit UNVERIFIED flag rather than estimated.
